home.hero:
StarHub watches your hiring, cash, and growth in one place — then tells you exactly what 
needs attention before it becomes a crisis.
home.problem: The average funded startup wastes 12 hours a week chasing data that already exists. That's 3 months a year your leadership team spends on reporting instead of building.
home.swipe-hint: Swipe to see what it's costing you →
home.no-connection-no-context-no-clarity: No connection. No context. No clarity.
home.solution: StarHub doesn't just show you data. It understands your company — and tells you exactly what to do about it.
home.sub-solution: StarHub sits on top of your existing stack. Nothing to rip and replace — just add intelligence to what you already have.
home.hr-and-people: Attrition risk, engagement signals, and hiring pipeline health, synced from every people tool you already use.
home.finance: Live burn, runway, and revenue concentration risk, recalculated automatically as new data lands.
home.operations: Cross-team workflows and bottlenecks flagged before a delay turns into a missed deadline.
home.sales: Pipeline velocity, deal risk, and churn signals pulled straight from your CRM — no manual exports.
home.analytics: Every dashboard your team already built, unified into one model the Core can reason about.
home.features-sub: StarHub unifies all your tools and data into one intelligent platform.
home.connect-your-stack-body: 50+ native connectors. Slack, HubSpot, Stripe, Notion, Google Workspace, and more — live in under 10 minutes. No dev work required.
home.build-your-company-memory-body: We ingest your history and real-time data, map every relationship between people, metrics, and events, and build your company's intelligence graph.
home.agents-go-to-work-body: Specialist AI agents start monitoring, analysing, and surfacing insights straight away — no dashboards to build, no reports to write.
home.you-get-clear-next-step-body: Prioritised alerts and plain-English recommendations land where your team works — Slack, email, or your dashboard — ranked by business impact.
home.decisions-made-body: Every action you take trains StarHub on your company. The longer you use it, the sharper, faster, and more valuable it becomes.
home.under-30-minutes-body: No onboarding calls. No 6-week implementation. No engineers. Just connect and go.
home.work-with-tools-sub: 50+ native connectors. No ETL pipelines. No data engineers. Just plug in and watch it work.
home.integration-body: + 38 more: Pipedrive, Intercom, GitHub, Linear, Datadog, Salesforce, and custom API
home.your-company-is-trying-to-tell-you-somet:
Your Company Is
Trying to Tell You Something
home.start-your-free-trial:
Start your free trial today. Connect your first tools in minutes and see what
 StarHub surfaces about your company before end of day.

tools.title: 14 tools. Zero connection.
tools.body: Your team lives in Slack, Notion, HubSpot, QuickBooks, and Greenhouse — but none of them talk. Every Monday you're stitching spreadsheets just to answer "how are we doing?"

buried.title: The insight is in there. Somewhere.
buried.body: You know the data exists. It's buried in dashboards nobody checks and reports nobody reads. Finding it costs you hours every week.

crisis.title: By the time you notice, it's a crisis.
crisis.body: Churn creep. Runway drift. A star employee going quiet. These aren't surprises — they're signals you missed because no one was watching all the data at once.

lag.title: You're solving last month's problems.
lag.body: Without real-time intelligence, your decisions lag reality by weeks. Opportunities close, risks compound, and leadership keeps asking questions ops can't answer fast enough.

connect.label: Connect
connect.desc: Plug in 50+ tools in under 10 minutes. No engineers needed.

unify.label: Unify
unify.desc: StarHub builds one living picture of your entire company.

detect.label: Detect
detect.desc: AI finds patterns, risks, and opportunities in real time.

predict.label: Predict
predict.desc: Know what's coming — not just what already happened.

alert.label: Alert
alert.desc: The right signal reaches the right person before it's urgent.

execute.label: Execute
execute.desc: Automated actions close the loop. No manual follow-up.

login.monitor-token-usage-body: Keep full visibility on AI token consumption and platform activity.
login.manage-your-companies-body: Track and manage all your companies from one centralized dashboard.
login.scale-with-confidence-body: Powerful analytics and tools to help your business grow faster.
